title: roegneria ciliaris
benefits: Roegneria ciliaris has many benefits, such as being a rich source of antioxidants, which help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases like cancer and heart disease. This plant also has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of conditions like arthritis, and may even aid in wound healing and tissue repair. Additionally, Roegneria ciliaris has been found to have antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating infections and promoting overall health and well-being. By incorporating Roegneria ciliaris into one's lifestyle, individuals can potentially experience improved cardiovascular health, reduced stress levels, and enhanced cognitive function, ultimately leading to a better quality of life.
constituents: Roegneria ciliaris has many active constituents, such as flavonoids, alkaloids, saponins, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have been found to possess various medicinal properties. These constituents include compounds like baicalein, baicalin, and wogonin, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, helping to alleviate symptoms of conditions like arthritis and improve overall cardiovascular health. The terpenoids present in Roegneria ciliaris, such as sesquiterpenes and diterpenes, have been shown to possess antimicrobial and antiviral properties, aiding in the treatment of infections and respiratory issues like the common cold. The various constituents of Roegneria ciliaris work together to improve daily lives by providing relief from pain, reducing the risk of chronic diseases, and promoting overall well-being.
parts: Roegneria ciliaris has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, leaves, and flowers. The roots of Roegneria ciliaris contain medicinally active compounds like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The leaves of the plant are rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which may help in relieving fever and treating respiratory issues. The flowers of Roegneria ciliaris contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive problems and reduce inflammation.
side_effects: Roegneria ciliaris can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems. Overconsumption of the plant's extracts can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Additionally, improper use of Roegneria ciliaris may also result in increased heart rate and blood pressure, which can be problematic for individuals with pre-existing cardiovascular conditions. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can even cause seizures, coma, or even death.
